response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, including embedded systems and C/C++ programming, but his resume lacks direct experience with Linux kernel modification, security technologies (e.g., MACsec, IEEE 802.1X), embedded networking, or Japanese language proficiency. His background is more aligned with web, mobile, and desktop development, with limited exposure to the required embedded security and networking domain.
strengths: Strong C/C++ experience with embedded systems (e.g., National Instruments LabWindows/CVI)
Diverse programming language expertise (D, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript)
Proven ability to lead and innovate in software projects (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No demonstrated experience with Linux kernel modification or security technologies (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, encryption)
Japanese language proficiency not mentioned; English is fluent but Japanese is required for this role
Limited exposure to networking technologies (e.g., REST API, NETCONF, SNMP) or embedded device development
